# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Composition Rules (identity = purl-if-present else name@version)
# Covers:
#   - same purl across files -> one component
#   - same name@version but different purls -> treated as distinct
#   - no purl -> fallback to name@version

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i a.json -i b.json -i c.json -o out.json

# samepurl appears exactly once (duplicate by purl)
exec jq -e '[.components[] | select(.name == "samepurl")] | length == 1' out.json

# different-purl pair (same name@version) -> kept distinct = 2 entries
exec jq -e '[.components[] | select(.name == "splitpurl")] | length == 2' out.json

# no-purl same name@version -> deduplicated by name@version
exec jq -e '[.components[] | select(.name == "nopurl")] | length == 1' out.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- a.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "samepurl", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "purl": "pkg:generic/a/samepurl@1.0.0",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}] },
    { "name": "splitpurl", "version": "2.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "purl": "pkg:generic/upstream-a/splitpurl@2.0.0",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}] },
    { "name": "nopurl", "version": "3.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}] }
  ]
}
-- b.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "samepurl", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "purl": "pkg:generic/a/samepurl@1.0.0",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}] },
    { "name": "splitpurl", "version": "2.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "purl": "pkg:generic/upstream-b/splitpurl@2.0.0",
      "supplier": {"name":"b"},
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}] }
  ]
}
-- c.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "nopurl", "version": "3.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"cccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccccc"}],
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://x"}] }
  ]
}
